description: Integration tests for auth flow and Case CRUD with real Postgres, plus CI workflow update with Postgres service container.
steps: Create test/auth.test.ts: integration tests using real Postgres via Docker (the container from FEAT-001). Tests: register success, register duplicate email fails, login success, login wrong password (generic error), logout invalidates session, GET /auth/me with valid/invalid session, MFA enroll + verify flow. Use fastify.inject() for all HTTP calls. Parse set-cookie header to extract session token for subsequent requests.

Create test/cases.test.ts: integration tests for Case CRUD. Setup: register two users in different tenants. Tests: create case (POST), list cases (GET with projectId filter), get case by id, update case (PATCH), soft-delete case (DELETE returns 200, subsequent GET returns 404), tenant isolation (user A cannot GET/PATCH/DELETE user B's case - returns 404 not 403 to avoid leaking existence).

Create test/helpers.ts: shared test utilities - buildTestApp() that creates app with test config pointing to real DB, registerUser() helper that creates tenant+user and returns session cookie, cleanDatabase() that truncates tables between tests.

Update .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml: add a postgres service container (postgres:16-alpine, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=qi, POSTGRES_USER=qi, POSTGRES_DB=qi_platform, health checks). Set DATABASE_URL and SESSION_SECRET env vars for the test step. Add prisma migrate deploy step before tests.
Ensure test isolation: each test file cleans up its data so tests can run independently and in any order.
acceptance_criteria: test/auth.test.ts passes with all auth flow scenarios covered
test/cases.test.ts passes with CRUD operations and tenant isolation verified
Tenant isolation test proves user in tenant A gets 404 (not 403) when accessing tenant B's case
CI workflow runs tests against real Postgres service container
All tests are independent and can run in any order
npm test passes all tests (health + auth + cases)
verification: npm test passes all tests with DATABASE_URL pointing to local Docker Postgres
Review .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml has postgres service and migration step
